strengths: Demonstrated clear understanding of Mishra's knot technique
Showed proper hand positioning for extracorporeal knot tying
weaknesses: Did not perform the required FLS task5 with Penrose drain and suture targets
Used instructional demonstration format instead of task execution
No FLS trainer equipment visible in the attempt

drills.name: FLS Setup Recognition
drills.description: Practice identifying and setting up the proper FLS task5 equipment including Penrose drain and marked suture targets before beginning any suturing sequence.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not perform the required FLS task5 with proper equipment.

drills.name: Needle driving angle practice
drills.description: 10 passes loading the needle at a stable driving angle before entering the drain using actual FLS trainer setup.
drills.targets_weakness: No FLS trainer equipment visible in the attempt.

drills.name: Task transition drill
drills.description: Practice moving from knot tying demonstrations to actual task performance on the FLS trainer with time pressure.
drills.targets_weakness: Used instructional demonstration format instead of task execution.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on translating your solid knot tying knowledge into actual FLS task performance with proper equipment and timing. Your technique understanding is strong but needs application to the standardized task format.
